issues.title: locked-ether
issues.description:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract RentalNFTSystem (contract.sol#6-100) has payable functions:
	 - RentalNFTSystem.listNFTForRent(uint256,uint256) (contract.sol#73-78)
	 - RentalNFTSystem.rentNFT(uint256) (contract.sol#82-90)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
issues.filename:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract RentalNFTSystem (contract.sol
issues.recommendation: Add withdrawal function or make contract payable

stage2_metadata.security_summary:
Contract Type: Custom
Classification Confidence: 90%
Access Control: role_based
Security Features: Standard
Implementation: Custom from scratch
Subtype: rental_system

Reasoning: The contract involves renting NFTs, which is not covered by standard NFT templates like ERC721 or ERC1155. It requires custom logic for managing rental durations, ownership during rental, and other rental-specific features.
